name: Inline validation (Vue 3)
algorithm: Field stays silent until first blur (or parent submit). Once touched, injected pure rule functions re-run on every input so corrections clear immediately. Validity is emitted for the parent form; exposed validate() force-shows the first failing rule's message, wired via aria-describedby/aria-invalid.
reduced_motion: Message reveal transition (transform/opacity) collapses to an instant swap under prefers-reduced-motion.
responsive_behaviour: fluid; field capped at readable max-width, 44px input target; no fixed pixel motion
browser_support: All modern browsers; matchMedia change listener uses optional chaining.
accessibility: aria-invalid + aria-describedby link the message; role=alert announces once on appear; error conveyed with text + icon, never colour alone; label association and focus ring preserved.
